## 🎉 Thanks for contributing to Auto-SignIn!

We appreciate your contribution and will review it as soon as possible.

### 📋 Before submitting your PR, please ensure:

- [ ] You've read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] You've read the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] Your code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] You've added tests for new features
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] You've updated documentation if needed

### 🔍 What happens next?

1. **Automated Checks**: CI/CD pipeline will run tests
2. **Code Review**: Maintainers will review your code
3. **Feedback**: You may receive feedback or change requests
4. **Approval**: Once approved, your PR will be merged
5. **Release**: Changes will be included in the next release

### 💬 Need help?

If you have any questions, feel free to:
- Comment on this PR
- Open a discussion in [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/badhope/Auto-SignIn/discussions)
- Check the [documentation](../README.md)

Thank you for making Auto-SignIn better! 🚀
